data.content:
环境条件温度-20℃~40℃
环境条件湿度低于90%RH（无结露）
环境条件环境远离活性气体、可燃气体、油滴、灰尘。
环境条件安装海拔1000m及以下：额定功率，1000m以上：每100m功率下降1.5%，最大4000m
data.content_en:
Environmental ConditionsTemperature-20℃~40℃
Environmental ConditionsHumidityBelow 90%RH(no condensation)
Environmental ConditionsEnvironmentAway from active gases, flammable gases, oil droplets, dust.
Environmental ConditionsInstallation Altitude1000m and below: rated power, above 1000m: power derating 1.5% per 100m, max 4000m
